title: DOS implements $1 fee for Diversity Visa Lottery
description_html:
The Department of State (DOS) issued a final rule establishing a $1 fee to enter the Diversity Visa Lottery. Previously, there was no cost. The new fee will take effect on October 16, 2025, and will be payable at registration. The $1 fee is in addition to a $330 application fee paid by lottery winners who apply for a Diversity Visa. DOS predicts that the new fee will bring in $25 million annually.
